source_name: Eurostat regional employment by NACE
source_name_it: Eurostat occupazione regionale per NACE
notes: Employment by NACE aggregate O-U at NUTS2. Used for EU regional comparisons. Note: Q/P/S94 not separable at NUTS2.

source_name: Eurostat national employment by detailed NACE
source_name_it: Eurostat occupazione nazionale per NACE dettagliato
notes: Employment by detailed NACE sections P85/Q86/Q87/Q88/S94/S96 at national level only. Complements nama_10r_3empers with sectoral detail.

source_name: Eurostat local units by NACE and NUTS2
source_name_it: Eurostat unità locali per NACE e NUTS2
notes: Number of local units (LOC_NR) by NACE P85/Q86/Q87/Q88/S96 at NUTS2. Replaces bd_enace2_r3. Note: S94 not available in this dataset.

source_name: ISTAT volunteering by gender age and form
source_name_it: ISTAT volontariato per genere eta e forma
notes: Primary volunteering dataset. Multiple data_types: % rate (HAUA_15) / thousands (HUA_15) / mean hours / absolute count. Source: Indagine sul Volontariato feb 2026.

source_name: ISTAT volunteering by activity type
source_name_it: ISTAT volontariato per tipo di attivita
notes: Type of activity performed by volunteers by gender and form.

source_name: ISTAT volunteering by years active
source_name_it: ISTAT volontariato per anni di attivita
notes: Duration of volunteering activity by gender and form.

source_name: ISTAT volunteering by education and labour status
source_name_it: ISTAT volontariato per istruzione e condizione professionale
notes: Volunteering rate by educational level and labour market status.

source_name: ISTAT volunteering by household and economic resources
source_name_it: ISTAT volontariato per nucleo familiare e risorse economiche
notes: Volunteering rate by household size and self-assessed economic resources.

source_name: ISTAT volunteering by region and municipality type
source_name_it: ISTAT volontariato per regione e tipo comune
notes: Territorial breakdown of volunteering rates. All 21 regions plus municipality size class.

source_name: ISTAT organised volunteering by sector
source_name_it: ISTAT volontariato organizzato per settore
notes: Share of organised volunteers by sector and multi-membership by gender.

source_name: ISTAT organised volunteering by institutional type
source_name_it: ISTAT volontariato organizzato per tipo istituzionale
notes: Volunteering by host organisation type: ODV / APS / cooperative sociale etc. Maps to D.Lgs. 117/2017.

source_name: ISTAT organised volunteering by motivation
source_name_it: ISTAT volontariato organizzato per motivazione
notes: Motivations for volunteering by gender.

source_name: ISTAT organised volunteering by personal impact
source_name_it: ISTAT volontariato organizzato per impatto personale
notes: Self-reported personal benefits of volunteering by gender. Relevant for SROI frameworks.

source_name: ISTAT associationism by age
source_name_it: ISTAT associazionismo per eta
notes: Association membership rate by age group. Source: Aspetti della Vita Quotidiana (AVQ) set 2025.

source_name: ISTAT associationism by age and education
source_name_it: ISTAT associazionismo per eta e istruzione
notes: Association membership by age group and educational qualification.

source_name: ISTAT associationism by occupational status
source_name_it: ISTAT associazionismo per condizione professionale
notes: Association membership by labour market status.

source_name: ISTAT associationism by region and municipality type
source_name_it: ISTAT associazionismo per regione e tipo comune
notes: Territorial breakdown of association membership by region and municipality size class.

source_name: RUNTS — Registro Unico Terzo Settore
source_name_it: RUNTS — Registro Unico Terzo Settore
notes: Entity registry post-Codice del Terzo Settore. Download from mlps.gov.it.

source_name: Registro Imprese — Camere di Commercio
source_name_it: Registro Imprese — Camere di Commercio
notes: Cooperative register including social cooperatives.
